title: Java Fullstack
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**What You Will Love About Working Here**
 You will get comprehensive wellness benefits including health checks, telemedicine, insurance with top\\-ups, elder care, partner coverage or new parent support via flexible work.
   

  

* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
* Capgemini office campuses in India are green and run on 100% renewable electricity. We have installed Solar plants across India locations and ‘Battery Energy Storage Solution’ (BESS) in the Noida and Mumbai campuses. You will have chance to make a difference everyday.
* Every Monday, kick off the week with a musical act by our in\\-house band \\- The Rubber Band. Also get to participate in internal sports events, yoga challenges, or marathons.


 Your Profile
   

  

* Strong experience in AWS services (ECS/EKS or Lambda, API Gateway, S3, CloudFront, IAM, RDS/DynamoDB, SNS/SQS, CloudWatch).
* Proficiency in Microservices architecture, asynchronous messaging, and patterns (CQRS, Saga, Circuit Breaker).
* Experience with CI/CD, IaC (Terraform or CloudFormation), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Solid understanding of REST, GraphQL, JWT/OAuth2, WebSockets, and gRPC (nice\\-to\\-have).
* Hands\\-on with SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and NoSQL (DynamoDB/Redis).
* Education: B.E./B.Tech/MCA or equivalent work experience.


 Your Role
   

  

* Backend Development: Design, build, and maintain microservices using Java (8–21\\), Spring Boot, and REST/GraphQL APIs.
* Cloud Architecture: Develop and deploy cloud\\-native applications on AWS (ECS/EKS/Lambda), applying Well\\-Architected principles.
* Data \\& Integration: Implement secure integrations via SNS/SQS, EventBridge, Kinesis, Kafka, and manage data flows using RDS/DynamoDB, Aurora, ElastiCache.
* CI/CD \\& IaC: Build CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions/GitLab) and define infrastructure using Terraform/CloudFormation.
* Security \\& Compliance: Implement IAM policies, Secrets Manager, KMS encryption, VPC/Networking best practices; support DevSecOps.
* Performance \\& Reliability: Conduct performance tuning, caching strategies, load testing; build resilient systems with retries/circuit breakers.


 Capgemini is an AI\\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\\-to\\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\\.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real \\| www.capgemini.com

description:

 If you’re excited to shape how the world works, you’ll help build systems used daily across Microsoft Teams, Zoom, ServiceNow, Zendesk, GitHub, and many more \\- deeply embedded where people get things done. * Experience in testing mobile applications a plus

**Compensation \\& Benefits**
 Compensation offered will be determined by factors such as location, level, job\\-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Certain roles may be eligible for variable compensation, equity, and benefits.
   

  

 We are a diverse bunch of people and we want to continue to attract and retain a diverse range of people into our organization. We're committed to an inclusive and diverse company. We do not discriminate based on gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, civil or family status, age, disability, or race.

title: SDET  - QA (Remote)
description:
Jitterbit automates and orchestrates business systems to empower teams, unlock value, and accelerate business transformation. With Jitterbit, organizations can streamline operations, enhance data accessibility, and deliver on a growing list of IT needs more quickly and confidently.
   

  





 For organizations ready to modernize and innovate, Jitterbit provides a unified AI\\-infused low\\-code platform for integration, orchestration, automation, and app development that accelerates business transformation, boosts productivity, and unlocks value. The Jitterbit Harmony platform, including iPaaS, API Manager, App Builder and EDI, future\\-proofs operations, simplifies complexity and drives innovation for organizations globally.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**ABOUT THE COMPANY**




 Jitterbit is a market\\-leading Enterprise Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS) \\& API Management solution provider recognized in Gartner MQ for seven straight years. We help businesses make faster and more effective decisions by making it fast, easy, and cost\\-effective to seamlessly connect their data, apps, and devices. In order to do this, we need to build a high\\-quality platform that is reliable, stable, and scalable for our customers. Do you have the quality\\-driven initiative to lead validation and testing efforts on our products and take on this challenge?
   

  





**What you will be doing:**




 Jitterbit is seeking a SDET Engineer who is smart, curious, and loves the challenge of solving problems that improve the testing feedback loop. You'll collaborate with an agile team to architect, implement, and continuously deliver the testing tools and infrastructure required to run tests at scale for both our front\\-end and back\\-end components. You'll be using the latest from Node, Webdriver.io, and Typescript or from pytest and Python to accomplish these goals. You will also work with our DevOps team to integrate tests into our CI/CD pipeline using tools like Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Selenium Grid, Docker, and other similar technologies. You will also be exposed to a lot of different end\\-user endpoints we are supporting from MS Sql Server/MySQL/Oracle/MongoDB, to MS Dynamics CRM/Salesforce/NetSuite, and other technology endpoints such as REST/SOAP/FTP/HTTP/XML etc.
   

  





 We believe in approaching our automated testing efforts just like any other software development effort. That's why we're not just writing tests, we're building test software and reporting solutions that help our developers continuously deliver new features and products to our customers. Like keeping up with the latest trends and technologies in automated testing? Great! You'll be expected to do that and much more. We want someone who isn't afraid to experiment and bring new ideas to the table. You should be self\\-educating and self\\-motivated through curiosity, a passion for quality, and an unruly desire to squash software bugs dead in their tracks. Come help us re\\-imagine our solutions to provide an integration platform that delights our customers and improves the performance of a world\\-class engineering team.
   

  





  

  





  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**
* **Automation Leadership \\& Craftsmanship** 
 – 4\\+ years as a Software Engineer in Test with hands\\-on experience designing, building, and evolving scalable automation frameworks from the ground up. You take pride in creating infrastructure that teams rely on.
* **Impact Through Automation** 
 – A proven track record of thoughtfully transforming manual test coverage into maintainable, high\\-value automated test suites — balancing speed, reliability, and long\\-term sustainability.
* **Modern Testing Ecosystem Expertise** 
 – Strong experience with modern frameworks and tools such as Node.js, Angular, WebdriverIO, Jasmine/Mocha, Selenium, or PyTest (or comparable technologies). You understand how to select the right tool for the right problem.
* **Strong Programming Foundations** 
 – Proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or similar languages, with the ability to write clean, maintainable, production\\-quality test code.
* **Agile Quality Mindset** 
 – Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments as an embedded Quality Engineer who influences design, improves testability, and helps teams deliver with confidence — not just at the end, but throughout the lifecycle.
* **Cloud \\& SaaS Testing Experience** 
 – Exposure to iPaaS, SaaS, or other cloud\\-based platforms. You understand distributed systems, integrations, and the complexity of validating them.
* **API \\& Integration Depth** 
 – Hands\\-on experience testing APIs (REST/SOAP), working with JSON/XML payloads, and validating integrations with relational databases, CRM/ERP systems, and third\\-party platforms.
* **Tooling \\& CI/CD Fluency** 
 – Comfortable working with tools such as Postman, Jenkins, Docker, VirtualBox/Hyper\\-V, npm/yarn, JMeter, JIRA, GitHub, and related DevOps toolchains to support continuous testing.
* **AI\\-Enhanced Productivity** 
 – Experience leveraging AI tools to improve test generation, code quality, analysis, or productivity — and curiosity to continue exploring what’s possible.
* **Technical Curiosity** 
 – Comfortable reading vendor API documentation and independently navigating complex integration landscapes.
* **Remote Collaboration Excellence** 
 – Experienced in working with distributed teams across time zones, demonstrating strong ownership, communication, and proactive collaboration.
* **Communication \\& Influence** 
 – Clear, confident verbal and written communication skills. You can articulate risk, advocate for quality, and partner effectively with engineers, product managers, and leadership.
* **Flexibility \\& Ownership** 
 – Willingness to flex hours when needed to support cross\\-time\\-zone collaboration and critical releases.


**Additional Information**


**What You’ll Get:**



* Work for a growing leader within the Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS) tech space
* Join a mission\\-driven company that is transforming the industry by changing the way customers use API creation within business\\-critical processes.
* Career development and mentorship
* A flexible, remote\\-friendly company with personality and heart



**Please be advised that Jitterbit does not:**



* Conduct interviews through unsecure messaging platforms.
* Request sensitive personal information, such as social security numbers or bank details, during initial contact.
* Require payment or fees from applicants at any stage of the hiring process.
* Offer unrealistic salaries or benefits packages.



  

  





 Jitterbit is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, physical or mental disability, genetic factors, military/veteran status or other characteristics protected by law.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Full Stack
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two\\-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third\\-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end\\-to\\-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross\\-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross\\-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Description Summary:**
 What you need to know about the Role: We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Engineer with deep expertise in ReactJS, NodeJS, and Java/J2EE technologies to join our dynamic team working on Sales Technologies supporting the sales and service functions. Familiarity with GitHub Copilot / Claude Code as a coding assistant is essential for design, development and to streamline test case generation, test data setup, and other coding and automation tasks. Meet our Team: Sales Technology Engineering is the team powering PayPal’s Global Market Sales organization. We build intelligent systems, AI\\-driven tools, and CRM infrastructure that 4,000\\+ sellers rely on every day to close deals and grow revenue. We’re builders shaping how PayPal sells.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project\\-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day\\-to\\-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3\\+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities And Preferred Qualifications**
**In this role, you will:**
* Design and develop scalable web applications.
* Implement robust APIs and backend systems.
* Ensure seamless integration between front\\-end and back\\-end components.
* Operates with little day\\-to\\-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices. Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Contribute to code reviews, solve complex technical challenges, and deliver innovative solutions.


**Key Responsibilities**
* Front\\-End Development
* Design and implement scalable and responsive user interfaces using TypeScript/NextJS/ReactJS.
* Experience with authoring high\\-level design diagrams
* Develop reusable components and integrate with RESTful APIs.
* Optimize front\\-end code for performance, accessibility, and browser compatibility.


 Back\\-End Development
   

  

* Build efficient and secure server\\-side applications using NodeJS, Java/J2EE.
* Design and develop RESTful APIs and microservices.
* Work with databases (SQL/NoSQL) to support web applications.
* Implement robust backend logic using Java/J2EE frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot, Hibernate).
* Ensure secure and high\\-performance server\\-side programming.
* Integrate third\\-party APIs and external services.
* Experience with MCPs and AI app development is added advantage


 Collaboration \\& Agile Development
   

  

* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams including Product Managers, UI/UX Designers, QA Engineers, and DevOps.
* Participate in Agile development practices (Sprint planning, Stand\\-ups, Retrospectives).
* Contribute to technical design and architecture discussions.


 Testing \\& Debugging
   

  

* Write automated unit tests and ensure high code coverage. Knowledge of testing frameworks that follow the best practices of customer functional testing.
* Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and performance bottlenecks.
* Conduct code reviews and assist in maintaining code quality standards.


 Deployment \\& Maintenance
   

  

* Deploy web applications using modern CI/CD pipelines and cloud environments (e.g., GCP).
* Monitor applications, maintain existing systems, and address issues as needed.


**Required Skills \\& Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science or equivalent
* Minimum 6 years of experience in software development in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Proficiency in ReactJS and related technologies (Redux, React Hooks, Material\\-UI, Tailwind CSS, etc.).
* Hands\\-on experience in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6/ES7\\).
* Expertise in NodeJS and its ecosystem (ExpressJS, NextJS, or similar).
* Ability to design RESTful APIs and work with databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
* Strong knowledge of Java, Spring Boot framework, JPA, and Hibernate.
* Familiarity with J2EE stack for enterprise\\-level application development.


**General**
* Solid understanding of software architecture, design patterns, and best practices and microservice architecture and container orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes).
* Familiarity with version control systems like Git and development platforms like GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket.
* Acumen with AI\\-assisted coding practices, such as prompt and plan\\-based coding using Code Assist tools such as GitHub Copilot / Claude Code, Gemini, and Claude, is preferred. f not, the candidate should bring an eagerness to learn
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience with cloud technologies (AWS/GCP/Azure).
* Experience with GraphQL and WebSocket communication.


 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact\\-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in\\-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset\\-you. That’s why we offer benefits to help you thrive in every stage of life. We champion your financial, physical, and mental health by offering valuable benefits and resources to help you care for the whole you.
   

  

 We have great benefits including a flexible work environment, employee shares options, health and life insurance and more. To learn more about our benefits please visit https://www.paypalbenefits.com
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 To learn more about our culture and community visit https://about.pypl.com/who\\-we\\-are/default.aspx
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

title: Software Engineer III
description:
Job Description Summary:
   

  

 We are looking for a passionate and detail\\-oriented Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust automated test frameworks and pipelines that ensure the highest quality of our software products. You will work closely with developers, product owners, and DevOps engineers to embed quality at every stage of the software development lifecycle.
   

  

 About Team:
   

  

 Our team collaborates with Walmart International, which has over 5,900 retail units operating outside of the United States under 55 banners in 26 countries including Africa, Argentina, Canada, Central America, Chile, China, India, Japan, and Mexico, to name a few.
   

  

 What you'll do:
   

  

 Design, develop, and maintain scalable automation frameworks using Java (TestNG / JUnit / Cucumber / RestAssured)
   

  

 Build and enhance API automation test suites for REST/GraphQL services
   

  

 Develop reusable test libraries, utilities, and page object models for UI and API layers
   

  

 Perform code reviews for test automation code to ensure quality, maintainability, and best practices
   

  

 Integrate test suites into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins / GitHub Actions / Concord / Looper)
   

  

 Manage test execution triggers, reporting, and gating within pipelines
   

  

 Collaborate with DevOps teams to shift testing left and ensure automated tests run on every PR/merge
   

  

 Configure and maintain test environments in collaboration with infrastructure teams
   

  

 Execute and validate tests in cloud environments (AWS / Azure / GCP)
   

  

 Understand containerised testing with Docker and orchestration via Kubernetes
   

  

 Work with cloud\\-native services and validate distributed microservices architecture
   

  

 Experience with cloud monitoring/observability tools (Splunk, Grafana, CloudWatch)
   

  

 Write complex SQL queries to validate data integrity, transformations, and consistency
   

  

 Perform database\\-level testing across relational (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra) databases
   

  

 Validate ETL pipelines and data flows as part of end\\-to\\-end testing
   

  

 Define and implement test strategies for functional, regression, integration, performance, and smoke testing
   

  

 Analyze test results, identify flaky tests, and drive stability improvements
   

  

 Conduct root cause analysis on test failures and defects
   

  

 Participate in sprint ceremonies — story grooming, test planning, retrospectives
   

  

 Report quality metrics and testing KPIs to stakeholders
   

  

 What you'll bring:
   

  

 3–5 years of hands\\-on experience in software testing with strong automation focus
   

  

 Strong proficiency in Java with practical experience building automation frameworks from scratch
   

  

 Demonstrated experience in API test automation using RestAssured or equivalent
   

  

 Experience integrating tests into CI/CD pipelines and working in agile/DevOps environments
   

  

 Good working knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
   

  

 Strong SQL skills — ability to write queries for data validation and testing
   

  

 Solid understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems testing
   

  

 Experience with Docker and basic understanding of containerised test execution
   

  

 Hands\\-on experience with performance testing tools (JMeter / Gatling / Locust) — test planning, execution, and analysis
   

  

 Experience with mobile test automation using Appium for iOS and/or Android platforms
   

  

 Excellent analytical and problem\\-solving skills
   

  

 Strong communication skills — ability to articulate quality risks to technical and non\\-technical stakeholders
   

  

**About Walmart Global Tech**

 Work

**Benefits**

 Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech.  Work

 Belonging

 Option 1: Bachelor's degree in computer science, computer engineering, computer information systems, software engineering, or related area and 3 years’ experience in software engineering or related area.
   

  

 Option 2: 5 years’ experience in software engineering or related area.
   

  

 Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.
   

  

 Master’s degree in computer science, information technology, engineering, information systems, cybersecurity, or related area and 1 year’s experience leading information security or cybersecurity projects, We value candidates with a background in creating inclusive digital experiences, demonstrating knowledge in implementing Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2\\.2 AA standards, assistive technologies, and integrating digital accessibility seamlessly. title: PRINCIPAL, SOFTWARE ENGINEER (IAM development with AI)
description:
We are seeking a Principal Software Engineer to architect, own, and deliver identity, authentication, and authorization solutions for agentic AI ecosystems. This role focuses on non\\-human identity (NHI), with focus on AI identity control plane, AI identity governance, continuous authentication, risk\\-based access control, and adaptive authorization on a global scale.
   

  

 You will own reference architectures and lead delivery of secure, scalable AI identity solutions.
   

  

**What You Will Do – Responsibilities**
 Own and evolve AI identity reference architectures.
   

  

 Architect and implement secure identity solutions for agentic AI systems.
   

  

 Design and enforce delegated authority and adaptive authorization models.
   

  

 Implement continuous authentication and risk\\-based access control.
   

  

 Build automation for agent identity lifecycle and credential governance.
   

  

 Define observability, audit, and compliance controls for agent actions.
   

  

 Mentor engineers and drive engineering standards.
   

  

 Partner with platform and security teams to deliver secure AI capabilities.
   

  

**What You Will Bring – Skills / Capabilities**
 10\\+ years of Software Engineering experience building and deploying enterprise scale systems.
   

  

 3\\+ years of experience in Identity, authentication and authorization at enterprise scale.
   

  

 Strong understanding of agentic AI architectures and Non\\-Human Identity lifecycle management.
   

  

 Experience designing continuous authentication and runtime trust evaluation.
   

  

 Hands\\-on experience with adaptive authorization and policy\\-as\\-code.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of cloud\\-native identity, workload identity, and API security.
   

  

 Experience building and operating distributed identity services.
   

  

 Solid automation skills (Python, PowerShell).
   

  

 Strong design and cross\\-team communication skills.
   

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
 Experience with Azure, AWS, or GCP identity platforms.
   

  

 Kubernetes workload identity or service mesh experience.
   

  

 Prior experience in regulated industries.
   

  

**About Walmart Global Tech**
 Imagine working in an environment where one line of code can make life easier for hundreds of millions of people. That’s what we do at Walmart Global Tech. We’re a team of software engineers, data scientists, cybersecurity expert's and service professionals within the world’s leading retailer who make an epic impact and are at the forefront of the next retail disruption. People are why we innovate, and people power our innovations. We are people\\-led and tech\\-empowered.
   

  

 We train our team in the skillsets of the future and bring in experts like you to help us grow. We have roles for those chasing their first opportunity as well as those looking for the opportunity that will define their career. Here, you can kickstart a great career in tech, gain new skills and experience for virtually every industry, or leverage your expertise to innovate at scale, impact millions and reimagine the future of retail.
   

  

 Walmart’s culture sets us apart, and we know being together helps us innovate, learn and grow great careers. This role is based in our \\[Bangalore/Chennai] office for daily work, with the flexibility for associates to manage their personal lives.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Beyond our great compensation package, you can receive incentive awards for your performance. Other great perks include a host of best\\-in\\-class benefits maternity and parental leave, PTO, health benefits, and much more.
   

  

 Belonging
   

  

 We aim to create a culture where every associate feels valued for who they are, rooted in respect for the individual. Our goal is to foster a sense of belonging, to create opportunities for all our associates, customers and suppliers, and to be a Walmart for everyone.
   

  

 At Walmart, our vision is "everyone included." By fostering a workplace culture where everyone is—and feels—included, everyone wins. Our associates and customers reflect the makeup of all 19 countries where we operate. By making Walmart a welcoming place where all people feel like they belong, we’re able to engage associates, strengthen our business, improve our ability to serve customers, and support the communities where we operate.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Employer
   

  

 Walmart, Inc., is an Equal Opportunities Employer – By Choice. We believe we are best equipped to help our associates, customers and the communities we serve live better when we really know them. That means understanding, respecting and valuing unique styles, experiences, identities, ideas and opinions – while being inclusive of all people.
   

  

 Minimum Qualifications...Outlined below are the required minimum qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no minimum qualifications.
   

  

 Option 1: Bachelor's degree in computer science, computer engineering, computer information systems, software engineering, or related area and 5 years’ experience in software engineering or related area.
   

  

 Option 2: 7 years’ experience in software engineering or related area.
   

  

 Preferred Qualifications...Outlined below are the optional preferred qualifications for this position. If none are listed, there are no preferred qualifications.
   

  

 Master’s degree in computer science, computer engineering, computer information systems, software engineering, or related area and 3 years' experience in software engineering or related area., We value candidates with a background in creating inclusive digital experiences, demonstrating knowledge in implementing Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2\\.2 AA standards, assistive technologies, and integrating digital accessibility seamlessly. The ideal candidate would have knowledge of accessibility best practices and join us as we continue to create accessible products and services following Walmart’s accessibility standards and guidelines for supporting an inclusive culture.

title: Performance & OS QA Engineer
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\\-to\\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Compute at HPE** 
 helps organizations power their edge\\-to\\-cloud platform with proven, workload\\-optimized products, solutions, and services. Our leading supercomputing technologies enable customers to transform and modernize their IT infrastructure, solve complex problems and support new business opportunities with purpose\\-built infrastructure and software. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Build and configure server hardware and firmware for performance \\& OS QA tests.
* Install and maintain operating systems (Linux and Windows) and required software stacks.
* Deploy, run, and validate industry standard benchmarks and microbenchmarks and custom performance tools (e.g., STREAM, LINPACK).
* Collect, analyze, and interpret performance data; isolate root causes across CPU, memory, I/O, OS, and application layers.
* Tune system, OS, SW stack, and benchmark parameters to achieve target performance and energy efficiency goals.
* Troubleshoot complex cross component issues, reproducing problems and tracking fixes through to resolution.
* Produce clear technical documentation and test reports describing configurations, methodologies, results, and recommended changes.
* Collaborate with firmware, hardware, software, and product teams to implement and validate performance improvements.


**Ideal Candidate**
* Strong hands on experience with server hardware, operating systems, and industry benchmarks.
* Demonstrated ability to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks using analytical and debugging tools.
* Comfortable working with both Linux and Windows environments and remote management tools.
* Excellent troubleshooting skills, with the ability to follow complex interactions across HW, OS, and application layers.
* Good knowledge on any of the OS Certifications (HLK, VMware VIVA/workbench, rhcert, SUSE Yes Cert kit).
* Effective communicator and team player who can work across organizations to reproduce issues and drive solutions.
* Self motivated, detail oriented, and committed to producing repeatable, high quality performance results.


**What You Need To Bring**
**Education and Experience :**
* B.E/B. Tech/M.E/M. Tech/MCA (Full time) with
* Minimum 2\\+ years’ experience


**Knowledge And Skills**
 Strong foundation in server architecture and subsystems (CPU, memory, storage/I/O) and core operating system concepts. Familiarity with energy\\-efficiency techniques, Java runtimes, virtualization platforms, and database technologies is a plus.
   

  

 Proven ability to troubleshoot and administer both Linux and Windows server environments, including remote systems via management tools.
   

  

 Demonstrated experience identifying, analyzing and resolving performance bottlenecks across an enterprise server portfolio.
   

  

 Comfortable documenting technical findings and producing clear English whitepapers on system configurations, tuning techniques and measurement results.
   

  

**Must Have**
* Solid knowledge of server subsystems (CPU, memory, storage/I/O) and operating system internals.
* Hands on experience troubleshooting and administering Linux and Windows servers.
* Practical experience identifying and analyzing server performance bottlenecks.
* Proficiency with performance and debugging tools (profilers, OS counters, tracing and related utilities).
* Experience working with remote servers and remote management tools.


**Desired Skill Set**
* Experience with industry\\-standard benchmarks (SPEC), specifically SPEC CPU 2017, SPECjbb 2015 and/or SPECpower\\_ssj 2008\\.
* Familiarity with performance microbenchmarks and tools (e.g., STREAM, LINPACK) and workload characterization.
* Background in capacity planning, benchmark development, or power/performance trade\\-off analysis.
* Eagerness to learn new technologies and apply them to improve performance and energy efficiency.


**Additional Skills**
 Cloud Architectures, Cross Domain Knowledge, Design Thinking, Development Fundamentals, DevOps, Distributed Computing, Microservices Fluency, Full Stack Development, Security\\-First Mindset, Solutions Design, Testing \\& Automation, User Experience (UX)
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \\& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \\& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 \\#india
   

  

 \\#compute
   

  

**Job**
 Engineering
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\\_01
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice \\& Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE\\-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors

title: Electrical Engineer
description:
Fluence (Nasdaq: FLNC) is a global market leader delivering intelligent energy storage and optimization software for renewables and storage. Our solutions and operational services are helping to create a more resilient grid and unlock the full potential of renewable portfolios. With gigawatts of successful implementations across nearly 50 markets, we are transforming the way we power our world for a more sustainable future. For more information, please visit fluenceenergy.com.
   

  

**Job Description**
* Lead Electrical Engineering scope within the projects independently, and drive project challenges to ground, by utilizing solid technical solutions.
* Responsible for the development of technical solutions and standards for project / customer specific features on electrical engineering topics
* Responsible for quality control of all deliverables within the scope of electrical engineering
* Executing tasks related to Fluence’ safety KPIs.
* Apply comprehensive knowledge to prepare and supervise the development of key project deliverables, including (but not limited to) the following:
+ Specifications and Datasheets
+ Electrical Load List
+ One\\-line diagrams
+ Protection and Metering schemes
+ Equipment layouts
+ Conceptual studies and calculations
+ Relay Coordination
+ Calculations

* Function as electrical engineering project lead
* Become fully familiar with the project contract, scope of work, basis of design, specifications, schedule and all inter\\-discipline requirements, including identifying concerns as early as practicable and taking appropriate initiatives to address the issues.
* Report to and coordinate with electrical engineering lead, project engineering manager, project manager, and electrical department manager
* Assist and coordinate with electrical engineers and designers.
* Maintain close coordination with other discipline engineers and with the Client’s engineer.
* Carefully evaluate, communicate, and manage change with full awareness of project impact.
* Prepare estimates for bid proposals, including technical query reviews, execution statements and workhour estimates, identifying software requirements and any other project\\-specific requirements.
* Perform FEED verification and gap analysis reports at early stage of the project.
* Prepare, review, and (as a Lead Engineer) approve discipline engineering design basis, philosophies, and technical specifications, data sheets reports and procedures.
* Participate in finalizing deliverables lists and deliverables, ensuring compliance with specifications and functional integrity.
* Attend project kick off and review meetings, vendor meetings, engineering meetings and site surveys as required.
* Provide technical solutions and assist other discipline engineers and designers to take suitable technical decisions related to project technical challenges.
* Attend 3D model reviews, safety workshops, constructability review \\& Client meetings.
* Assist in providing necessary design inputs to other disciplines to enable them in proceeding with their deliverables.
* Assist in procurement engineering activities that includes preparing, reviewing, and (as Lead Engineer) approving requisitions, evaluating technical quotations and preparing queries, compiling bid tabulations and recommendations, preparing purchase requisitions, and coordinating with Procurement to expedite vendor documents.
* Review and (as Lead Engineer) approve vendor and subcontractor technical submittals, checking for compliance with project specifications and providing comments as necessary.
* Review and (as Lead Engineer) approve design verification through single\\-discipline check/ inter\\-discipline check.
* Keep the Discipline Manager and Project Management Team apprised of all activities and concerns, technical, budgetary and manpower related.
* Check final subcontractor and vendor data manuals to ensure that all requested data has been received and approved.
* Review and (as Lead Engineer) approve Electrical system studies / calculations including ETAP/Power Factory/PSCAD.
* Participate in FAT \\& inspection and preparation \\& resolution of punch lists for major electrical equipment.
* Assist construction and commissioning engineers in solving site issues.
* Capture lessons learned and log them into Fluence Lessons Learned system.
* Assist and guide assigned engineers and coordinate with project Lead Designers for engineering and design deliverables including quality check list and audit readiness.
* Develop communication and presentation skills (e.g., present design solutions, and/or present knowledge sharing sessions to the team, value moments etc.).
* Travel throughout EMEA / internationally


**Skill Requirements**
* Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in electrical engineering (or equivalent)
* Minimum of 8 \\- 9 years of relevant work experience with design of power systems for utility installations, PV plants, Battery Storage Systems in the EMEA region
* Expert in the electrical system design, system studies, relay coordination, protection \\& control, grounding practice, HV and LV, design and study
* Expert in engineering, procurement and construction (EPC) for high voltage systems, wind, solar, or conventional power generation
* Expert with applicable codes, standards and regulations used in EMEA Region
* Strong technical skills and experience in finding solution on complex technical issues.
* Expert in procurement engineering (RFI, TQ, technical bid evaluation)
* Solution\\-orientated mindset.
* Strong communication skills.
* Exceptional project coordination and execution skills
* In\\-depth technical knowledge of the detailed design engineering process.
* Fluency in English


**Our Culture**
 At Fluence, our culture is the foundation that drives our ambitious growth strategy and fuels our mission to transform the future of energy. Our core cultural pillars empower us to innovate, collaborate, and lead with purpose, ensuring we continue to deliver unparalleled value to our customers and the world.
   

  

**Unleash Voices**
 We believe every voice matters. We encourage openness, active listening, and decisive action to create a culture where everyone has the opportunity to contribute to our success. We foster an environment where diverse perspectives are heard and valued, driving innovation and progress.
   

  

**Customer Fluent**
 Our customers are at the heart of everything we do. We’re committed to delivering exceptional value that exceeds expectations by understanding our customers' needs and adapting swiftly to meet them. Our deep focus on customer satisfaction drives us to continuously improve and innovate.
   

  

**Infinite Impact**
 We are committed to creating the impossible. We push boundaries to deliver sustainable, game\\-changing solutions that shape a brighter, more energy\\-efficient future for all. Our team is passionate about making a lasting impact that will resonate for generations to come.
   

  

**All In**
 We are all in for growth. Our teams are relentlessly focused on identifying and seizing opportunities that propel us forward. We embrace an ownership mindset, pushing ourselves and each other to accelerate progress and create lasting success.

title: Software Engineering Lead
description:
Optum is a global organization that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help us advance health optimization on a global scale. Join us to start
 **Caring. Connecting. Growing together.**
 Software engineering is the application of engineering to the design, development, implementation, testing and maintenance of software in a systematic method. The roles in this function will cover all primary development activity across all technology functions that ensure we deliver code with high quality for our applications, products and services and to understand customer needs and to develop product roadmaps.
   

  

 These roles include, but are not limited to analysis, design, coding, engineering, testing, debugging, standards, methods, tools analysis, documentation, research and development, maintenance, new development, operations and delivery. With every role in the company, each position has a requirement for building quality into every output. This also includes evaluating new tools, new techniques, strategies; Automation of common tasks; build of common utilities to drive organizational efficiency with a passion around technology and solutions and influence of thought and leadership on future capabilities and opportunities to apply technology in new and innovative ways.
   

  

**Primary Responsibilities**
* Design and develop software applications and application components in an agile environment using the E2E Java framework
* Create high\\-quality software by conducting peer design/code reviews and developing automated test cases
* Design patterns and optimize the performance of services
* Act as a hands\\-on engineer, leading by example and working independently
* Build production\\-ready features and capabilities adhering to the best engineering standards
* Share knowledge internally with peers and leaders, acting as a resource for teams and business units within areas of expertise
* Collaborate with Principal Engineers/Technical Architects to develop prototypes into production\\-ready features
* Leverage the latest technologies to solve complex problems facing the health care industry
* Guide and mentor junior engineers within the organization
* Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or re\\-assignment to different work locations, change in teams and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to the changing business environment). The Company may adopt, vary or rescind these policies and directives in its absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or otherwise) on its ability to do so


**Required Qualifications**
* Full time graduation degree
* 8\\+ years of software development experience, with at least 5\\+ years focused on Java/J2EE software development, including Java, Spring framework, multi\\-threading, caching techniques, software engineering best practices, and performance optimization of services using memory management, garbage collection, CI/CD systems such as Jenkins, and code management tools like GitHub. Java full stack (API backend heavy)
* 6\\+ years of professional software development experience on the Java platform
* 3\\+ years of experience in API \\& Integrations: Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs and event\\-driven architectures using Kafka or similar technologies
* 3\\+ years in Performance Optimization: Expertise in optimizing high\\-traffic, real\\-time payment processing systems for latency and throughput
* Experience designing and developing data\\-driven applications using RDMBS (Oracle, PL/SQL) and/or NoSQL datastores
* Knowledge of Java, API development, AWS Cloud Dev, Git Action


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 3\\+ years of DevOps \\& CI/CD: Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, Git, Artifactory, Fortify Scan, SonarQube), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), and monitoring tools like Prometheus, Grafana, or Datadog
* Experience in banking/financial/healthcare domain
* Experience in deploying applications on public cloud infrastructure
* Solid background in designing RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and service\\-oriented architectures
* Flexibility to work across a variety of software\\-related disciplines: solution design, agile development, unit testing and refactoring


*At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live healthier lives and make the health system work better for everyone. We believe everyone\\-of every race, gender, sexuality, age, location and income\\-deserves the opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however, there are still far too many barriers to good health which are disproportionately experienced by people of color, historically marginalized groups and those with lower incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes \\- an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.*

title: Sr. Staff Field Applications Engineer(Switching)
description:

description:
**Position Type**

**Type Of Hire**
 Experienced (relevant combo of work and education)
   

  

**Senior Quality Engineer (Performance Testing, JMeter, Automation) – Capital Market Domain (AI Testing Additional Advantage)**
 Are you curious, motivated, and forward\\-thinking? At FIS you’ll have the opportunity to work on some of the most challenging and relevant issues in financial services and technology. Our talented people empower us, and we believe in being part of a team that is open, collaborative, entrepreneurial, passionate and above all fun.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The Private Equity development team is a core product‑engineering team within the
 **Capital Markets** 
 division at FIS. The team owns the
 **end‑to‑end design, development, quality, reliability, and delivery** 
 of an industry‑leading private equity accounting platform used by global financial institutions.
   

  

 Capital Markets is one of the two primary verticals at FIS, delivering innovative solutions across funds management, cleared derivatives, commercial lending, corporate treasury, insurance risk, electronic trading, RegTech, and wealth and retirement services. Within this ecosystem, the Private Equity Accounting product plays a critical role in supporting complex fund structures, accounting workflows, and regulatory requirements for alternative investment firms.
   

  

 The team is a
 **cross‑functional product organization** 
 comprising
 **solution architects, backend and frontend developers, quality engineers, and site reliability engineers (SREs)** 
 . Together, they work closely to build scalable, secure, high‑performance solutions with a strong focus on
 **product quality, automation, operational excellence, and customer outcomes** 
 .
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
**As a Senior Performance Test Engineer** 
 , you will be responsible for defining and executing comprehensive
 **performance and non‑functional testing strategies** 
 for an industry‑leading
 **private equity fund accounting and investor management platform** 
 . You will design, build, and maintain
 **scalable JMeter‑based performance test solutions** 
 , enabling early identification of bottlenecks, high‑confidence releases, and resilient, enterprise‑grade systems. The role focuses on
 **performance engineering best practices** 
 , data‑driven analysis, and close collaboration with architects, developers, and SREs to ensure the platform meets demanding
 **scalability, reliability, and throughput requirements** 
 .
   

  

**What You Bring**
**Knowledge / Experience**
* Lead performance testing requirement analysis, performance strategy definition, and non‑functional test planning across load, stress, spike, endurance, and scalability testing
* Design, develop, execute, and maintain performance test suites using JMeter, covering web, API, and backend services
* Create and maintain reusable, modular JMeter test components, including thread groups, test data handling, listeners, and reporting mechanisms
* Analyze performance metrics such as response time, throughput, latency, error rates, CPU/memory utilization, and identify system bottlenecks
* Work closely with architects and developers to define performance benchmarks, SLAs, and acceptance criteria
* Integrate performance test execution into CI/CD pipelines where applicable to enable early detection of performance regressions
* Use structured LLM prompts to assist in generating performance test scripts, test scenarios, workload models, and edge‑case simulations (added advantage)
* Conduct baseline, comparative, and trend analysis to assess performance improvements or degradations across releases
* Build strong understanding of application architecture and end‑to‑end client workflows in the BFSI domain, including transaction\\-heavy systems
* Collaborate with Business Analysts, Solution Architects, Developers, SREs, and Infrastructure teams to identify performance risks early and recommend optimizations
* Design and prepare performance test data, including correlation, parameterization, and data volume strategies
* Drive all phases of performance test execution, analysis, reporting, and sign‑off, providing clear recommendations and actionable insights
* Support limited functional or automation testing activities where needed, leveraging exposure to automation frameworks
* Actively participate in Agile ceremonies, contributing to sprint, release, and readiness goals
* Implement and continuously improve performance engineering practices, documentation, dashboards, and best practices
* Mentor junior team members on JMeter, performance analysis techniques, and non‑functional testing fundamentals
* Ensure performance quality gates are met before production releases and that regressions are proactively prevented


**Skills**
* 8–12\\+ years of hands‑on experience in performance testing / non‑functional testing, with strong understanding of QA and performance engineering principles
* Strong proficiency in Apache JMeter, including test design, scripting, execution, and analysis
* Experience testing high‑throughput, high‑volume enterprise systems, preferably in BFSI / Capital Markets
* Exposure to test automation frameworks (UI or API automation) is desirable
* Experience integrating performance testing with CI/CD pipelines
* Familiarity with generating and optimizing test scripts using LLMs via structured prompts (added advantage)
* Strong understanding of system architectures, APIs, microservices, and backend integrations
* Proficiency in SQL / PL‑SQL for backend data validation and performance verification
* Working knowledge of UNIX/Linux commands, log analysis, and scripting
* Experience with test management tools, defect tracking systems, and version control tools such as Bitbucket
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex performance data and articulate findings clearly
* Ability to meet aggressive deadlines and deliver performance insights in fast‑paced environments
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, including executive‑ready performance reports


**Added Bonus If You Have (Desirable Skills)**
* Hands\\-on experience working in Agile / Scrum teams
* Exposure to Performance Testing and other Non\\-Functional Testing disciplines
* Experience validating AI/ML\\-based workflows or models from a quality perspective


**Qualifications**
 Bachelor’s degree in engineering or related field or the equivalent combination of education, training, or work experience
   

  

**Competencies**
* Fluent in English
* Excellent communicator – ability to discuss technical and commercial solutions to internal and external parties and adapt depending on the technical or business focus of the discussion
* Attention to detail – track record of authoring high\\-quality documentation
* Organized approach – manage and adapt priorities according to client and internal requirements
* Self\\-starter but team mindset \\- work autonomously and as part of a global team


**What We Offer You**
* A multifaceted job with a high degree of responsibility and a broad spectrum of opportunities
* A broad range of professional education and personal development possibilities – FIS is your final career step!
* A variety of career development tools, resources and opportunities


**Privacy Statement**
 FIS is committed to protecting the privacy and security of all personal information that we process in order to provide services to our clients. For specific information on how FIS protects personal information online, please see the Online Privacy Notice.
   

  

**Sourcing Model**
 Recruitment at FIS works primarily on a direct sourcing model; a relatively small portion of our hiring is through recruitment agencies. FIS does not accept resumes from recruitment agencies which are not on the preferred supplier list and is not responsible for any related fees for resumes submitted to job postings, our employees, or any other part of our company.
